task: The same email address keeps getting registered multiple times with different capitalisation. Prevent duplicate registrations for the same email in registration.py.
known_issue: The duplicate check uses the raw email but the store keeps the lowercased form, so the lookup and the insert disagree: registering Bob@x.com twice passes the check both times (raw "Bob@x.com" is never in a set containing only "bob@x.com") — exactly the capitalisation duplicates the task describes.
expected_correct_fix: Normalise before the check: key = email.lower(); if key in self.registered: raise; self.registered.add(key).
